sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7554" key="a)nastofa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναστοφάγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n7554.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not eating the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ναστός</foreign> (q. v.), Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:42:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.42.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
